mapper.insert: INSERT INTO speaking_library_attempts (user_id, section_id, sentence_id, phoneme_score, word_score, recorded_audio_storage_key, weak_phonemes_json) VALUES (#{userId}, #{sectionId}, #{sentenceId}, #{phonemeScore}, #{wordScore}, #{recordedAudioStorageKey}, #{weakPhonemesJson})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, section_id, sentence_id, phoneme_score, word_score, recorded_audio_storage_key, weak_phonemes_json, created_at FROM speaking_library_attempts WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, user_id, section_id, sentence_id, phoneme_score, word_score, recorded_audio_storage_key, weak_phonemes_json, created_at FROM speaking_library_attempts WHERE section_id = #{sectionId} ORDER BY created_at

SELECT id, user_id, section_id, sentence_id, phoneme_score, word_score, recorded_audio_storage_key, weak_phonemes_json, created_at FROM speaking_library_attempts WHERE section_id = #{sectionId} AND user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at
